compiled_state.title: RED test: Assert SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md prohibits CLI_user tag on autonomous bug tickets
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement (RED phase)

Create a new metadata validation test that FAILS before the SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md update.

Create: `tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh`

The test should:
1. Check that `plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md` contains language explicitly prohibiting the use of --tags CLI_user on autonomously-created bug tickets
2. Check for both "CLI_user" and the prohibition context (e.g., "must NOT" or similar near "CLI_user")

This test FAILS before the implementation task because SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md does not yet mention CLI_user.

Note: test name `test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh` does NOT fuzzy-match to `SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md` (normalized `subagentboundariesmd` is not a substring of the test's normalized name). Add .test-index entry as required.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh
- [ ] Test currently fails (RED) when run against unmodified SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
  Verify: Confirmed by inspection — grep for CLI_user in current BOUNDARIES.md returns empty
- [ ] .test-index entry added: `plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md: tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh`
  Verify: grep -q "SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` suite does not crash (test failure is expected, suite continues)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — RED test created and confirmed failing. Path: tests/scripts/test-sub-agent-boundaries-cli-user-tag.sh. Both assertions FAIL (PASSED: 0 FAILED: 2) because CLI_user is not yet mentioned in SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md. .test-index entry added to plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md line.
comments.author: Test
